seoTitle: Send WhatsApp Messages From Zapier (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Automatically send WhatsApp alerts from Zapier using the Business Cloud API, ManyChat, or Twilio, mapped to incoming lead data.
intro: Following up with leads by hand slows down response time and loses opportunities. This guide covers configuring Zapier to send automated WhatsApp messages using integrations like the WhatsApp Business Cloud API, ManyChat, or Twilio, so new leads or data events trigger real-time alerts straight to a customer's phone.

steps.heading: Set up your trigger step
steps.body: Configure your primary incoming lead or data trigger inside a new Zap.

steps.heading: Choose your WhatsApp action app
steps.body: Pick a WhatsApp integration such as WhatsApp Business Cloud API, Twilio, or a gateway like ManyChat.

steps.heading: Authenticate your account
steps.body: Connect your Meta or service account and manage the required cloud permissions.

steps.heading: Select your message type
steps.body: Choose between a Session Text message or a Pre-Approved Business Template based on your use case.

steps.heading: Map phone numbers and tokens
steps.body: Map dynamic customer phone numbers and data tokens into your message fields, handling global country codes correctly.

steps.heading: Test delivery before publishing
steps.body: Run a live end-to-end test and confirm message delivery on a mobile device.

faq.question: Which apps can I use to send WhatsApp messages from Zapier?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers WhatsApp Business Cloud API along with gateways like Twilio and ManyChat.

faq.question: Do I need Meta account authentication?
faq.answer: Yes, you authenticate your Meta or service account and manage cloud permissions to connect the integration.

faq.question: Can I use this to send booking confirmations automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, this setup is well suited for automating booking confirmations and customer follow-ups triggered by new data.

faq.question: What if my customer's number has an international format?
faq.answer: The setup includes handling global country codes when formatting the phone number data tokens.
